features: The One-Two Punch: Our cooling peppermint dandruff shampoo formulated with 2% pyrithione zinc (not the ineffective stuff other brands use) and our moisturizing conditioner with MCT oil that leaves your hair healthy not papery (like with 2-in-1s), are finally together…in separate bottles. Wash with Flakes dandruff shampoo and conditioner set to keep your hair fresh, hydrated, and protected. Our scalp brush helps removes just about everything from your scalp but your hair all while giving you a goose-bumping inducing head massage.

Smells like a Forest, Not a Locker Room: Meet the best-smelling anti-dandruff shampoo and conditioner for men. Synthetic fragrances can irritate the scalp. We took the time to create 100% natural fragrances to give you the best experience possible Enjoy our shampoo’s sweet, woodsy, and warm cedar scent and our conditioner’s refreshing yuzu and basil smell. Be the best-smelling man in the room.

A Formula Cleaner Than a Monk's Conscience: No sulfates, no parabens, no PEGs, no harsh ingredients that actually make dandruff worse. We designed a formula to stop dandruff and strengthen hair because no one should be worried about hair loss, a flaky scalp, or wearing black shirts.

Goodbye to Dandruff & Hello to Confidence: Drugstore brands have harsh ingredients that can irritate your scalp and make dandruff worse. Flakes shampoo for men uses 2x more of the active ingredient, pyrithione zinc, as legacy brands to get to the root cause of dandruff. Infused with MCT oil, our conditioner not only restores hair health but also adds an extra layer of dandruff defense.

Dermatologist Designed & Tested: Founded by Jason G. and dermatologist Dr. Bobby Buka, FLAKES is dedicated to creating cleaner, more effective, and better-smelling dandruff shampoo and conditioner. Flakes' journey was fueled by the desire to empower men to feel confident, break free from dandruff worries, and enjoy the benefits of a healthy scalp and great-looking hair. Because life’s too short to be flaky.
parentTitle: Flakes Anti-Dandruff Shampoo and Conditioner Set for Men
specialIngredients: MCT Oil, Peppermint Oil, Tea Tree Oil, 2% Pyrithione Zinc, Flakes
title: Flakes Anti Dandruff Shampoo and Conditioner Set for Men with Scalp Massager | Dry, Flaky, & Itchy Scalp Shampoo | Sulfate and Paraben Free | Hydrating Shampoo & Moisturizing Conditioner | 9 fl oz
